introduction.heading: Introduction
content: Welcome to O2UL ("the Platform"). By accessing or using our services, you agree to these Terms of Service ("Terms"). Please read them carefully.
O2UL is a global financial platform that empowers users to participate in a revolutionary dual-token economy while maintaining personal responsibility for their actions and transactions.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
content: By using O2UL, you agree to:

items: Be at least 18 years of age or have parental consent
Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
Take responsibility for your actions and transactions
Accept our Privacy Policy

sections.heading: Service Provision
content: O2UL provides a dual-token blockchain ecosystem featuring:

items: O2V (Value Token) - a scarcity-based token for long-term value storage
O2S (Stability Token) - an AI-powered algorithmic stablecoin
Blockchain infrastructure for secure transactions
Integrated wallet and exchange functionality
Create and manage blockchain accounts
Conduct transactions within legal boundaries
Access real-time market data and analytics
Participate in the token economy according to system rules
Illegal activities or money laundering
Market manipulation or fraud
Unauthorized access to others' accounts
Violations of applicable financial regulations
Cryptocurrency and blockchain markets are volatile
Investment decisions are solely the user's responsibility
O2UL does not provide financial advice
Users may lose part or all of their invested funds
O2UL is not liable for market losses or price fluctuations

sections.heading: Content and Account Ownership
content: Users retain ownership of their account and transactions while granting O2UL necessary rights to:

items: Store and process transaction data
Display transaction history and analytics
Enforce compliance with blockchain protocols
Modify technical formats for service operation

sections.heading: Account Termination
content: O2UL reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that:

items: Engage in illegal activities
Violate financial regulations or AML/KYC requirements
Conduct fraud, manipulation, or hacking attempts
Violate applicable laws or these Terms

content: Account termination decisions may be made at O2UL's sole discretion in compliance with legal requirements.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
content: O2UL is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for:

items: Market losses or price volatility
Service interruptions or technical failures
Loss of access to accounts or funds
Third-party actions affecting the network
Any consequential, incidental, or punitive damages

content: Users access and use the platform at their own risk.

sections.heading: Modifications to Terms
content: O2UL may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of modified terms.
Users will be notified of significant changes through the platform or email notification.

sections.heading: Indemnification
content: Users agree to indemnify and hold harmless O2UL, its operators, developers, and affiliates from:

items: Claims arising from user transactions or actions
Violations of these Terms or applicable laws
Disputes with other users
Legal fees and costs related to user activities
Regulatory fines or penalties for user misconduct

contact.heading: Contact Information
content: For inquiries regarding these Terms, please visit our website or contact through the platform support system.

footer.text: These Terms of Service are effective as of January 10, 2025 and supersede all previous versions.
